UserPromptSubmit.description: Verify reactor is reachable before running vault skills
UserPromptSubmit.command: MCP_URL=$(grep -o 'https\?://[^"]*' .mcp.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo 'http://localhost:4001/mcp'); curl -sf "$MCP_URL" -o /dev/null 2>/dev/null && echo "Reactor connected at $MCP_URL" || echo "WARNING: Reactor not reachable at $MCP_URL"
